channel.title: Untagged on The Miserly Horse
channel.description: Recent content in Untagged on The Miserly Horse

item.title: It's not gay...
item.content:
… apparently. Yeah right… Okkkkaaaaaaayyyyyy…

I don’t have many gay friends. It’s only Z. Z’s really popular with the other guys because he’s a bottom… and it turns out bottom’s are rare.

Not just here. Everywhere!

You know why bottom’s are rare? Because it turns out no one’s gay! Fucking another man in the ass isn’t gay… it’s only gay when you take it!

Who knew

item.title: Bob was a horse
item.content: This is a story about a horse. His name was Bob… and he was a bit of a cunt!
